title: Add diff-oriented proposal apply preview
summary: Extend the native proposal apply preview with a more concrete read-only diff-oriented plan so users can see likely scope touches, target candidates, and metadata gaps before any future automation.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal apply preview shows a diff-oriented summary of likely touches and metadata-backed targets.
The preview remains read-only and does not imply source files were changed.
The slice reuses existing proposal artifact metadata instead of inventing a second apply model.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Read-only apply preview now includes a diff-oriented plan that summarizes likely touches, target candidates, repository-backed paths, and remaining metadata gaps.

The diff plan is derived from existing proposal metadata such as scope, evidence, structured targets, token/component/view candidates, and validation findings, without introducing any write-back behavior.
Validated the ticket schema for the solved slice.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the diff-oriented apply preview slice.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 after HS-0022: extend read-only apply preview with a more precise diff-oriented view.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Keep the workflow read-only and repo-aware.
Prefer truthful impact language such as would touch, would compare, and missing metadata.
